name: Car Racing Game : Real Race Simulator

reviews.review_description: I went into this game taking a big risk due to the short comment didn't really explain it but made it sound like it's going to be good but due to the fake screenshots or how you looking a picture it doesn't look nothing like that in the game false advertising I got excited for this thinking it's going to look like the screenshot when I came to the game it didn't look nothing like that I really didn't really enjoy it due to the poor graphics in the back graphics on the car in the car they look poor a fake cash grab this is not what I expected I thought I'm going to look like the way to the pictures look like downtown club how they graphics look but it didn't it's washed out colors and it doesn't look realistic like you state for a staring but it doesn't feel like I'm in a good real environment looks fake and it's boring I don't like it I wish it looked the way I look on a picture but it's not

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your detailed feedback 🙌
We also hear you about drifting 👀 — it’s an important part of any race track game. Drift mechanics and improved handling are already planned for upcoming updates to make turns more exciting and realistic.
Thanks for your patience and support. More content and improvements are coming soon! 🚗💨

reviews.review_description: Really good game with amazing graphics but I can't unlock new cars or new stages just yet maybe it's a new game and there's almost no drifting which is a must have for turning on a race track game map

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your detailed feedback and for enjoying the graphics! 🙌
The issue with unlocking new cars and stages was related to an IAP bug, which has now been fully resolved in the latest update. Please update the game and try again — everything should work smoothly now.

We also hear you about drifting 👀 — it’s an important part of any race track game. Drift mechanics and improved handling are already planned for upcoming updates to make turns more exciting and realistic.

Thanks for your patience and support. More content and improvements are coming soon! 🚗💨
